title: Fuse lexical and vector retrieval
description: Combine BM25 and dense retrieval so exact-term matches and semantic matches both surface, improving recall over either alone.
body: Use when queries mix exact terms (codes, names, IDs) with semantic intent. Do not rely on dense vectors alone — they miss rare exact tokens, while BM25 alone misses paraphrase. Actions: run BM25 and vector retrieval, fuse with reciprocal rank fusion or a weighted score, and tune the fusion weight on a labeled set. Validation signals include hybrid recall exceeding both lexical-only and vector-only on the eval, and a fusion weight chosen by benchmark. Risk boundary: a badly weighted fusion can underperform either component; if hybrid does not beat both baselines, treat the fusion as misconfigured and re-tune before shipping.
